title: Stackable Stew and Soup
description: By making use of this mod, you will be able to stack the default stews and soups up to a maximum of 8 items in the same inventory slot.
body:
![STACKABLE STEW AND SOUP BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zqFS0wQJ/images/0681cd5a65193f01ccc885d166bc554a8bfe9d32.webp) By making use of this mod, you will be able to stack the default stews and soups up to a maximum of 8 items in the same inventory slot. In this way, these types of food will be much more useful and an ideal option for long trips. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![STACKABLE STEW AND SOUP SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zqFS0wQJ/images/5c2cbf6ba9090cced8a6fd2ce7209328dbba38ff.webp) The goal of the mod is simple, to facilitate the use of Minecraft bowls and soups. In vanilla form, it was impossible to stack, something that may make some sense due to all the food they provide, but we believe that being able to carry up to 8 bowls in the same space would be much better. ![STACKABLE STEW AND SOUP F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zqFS0wQJ/images/00b8dd00f3e179fdbe129e2d0ee027bf302e57cc.webp) ### Is it compatible with other bowl mods? It is compatible with the vast majority of mods of the style, which only modify the vanilla bowls to add other recipes. In any case, if there were any incompatibility we could work to solve it. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![STACKABLE STEW AND SOUP SCREENSHOT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zqFS0wQJ/images/8b393807960eebfe28be6b320d80f53eaa2038ff.webp) ![STACKABLE STEW AND SOUP IMAGE 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zqFS0wQJ/images/1cb6fefe3adfdffa10529940e627da699d9ce8ca.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
